title: Assistant Finance Manager - Manufacturing Start-Up
description:
• Be part of a growing company with exciting expansion plans across SEA.
  • Work with a strong and experienced leadership team committed to driving results.

About Our Client

Our client is a fast-growing precision engineering and manufacturing start-up headquartered in Singapore, making waves in the industrial and manufacturing sector. Known for delivering high-quality products and innovative solutions, they combine a strong operational and financial framework with an ambitious growth mindset. The company is rapidly expanding, launching new business ventures across Southeast Asia, and is guided by a dynamic leadership team committed to driving innovation and excellence. This is an exciting opportunity to join a company where your work can make a real impact and contribute to shaping its growth story.

Job Description

  • Manage the full financial reporting cycle for a Business Unit (BU), including monthly entity-level closing, sub-group consolidation, management reporting, compliance, and treasury oversight.
  • Review work performed by Finance Assistants (AP, bank admin, FA register, GST/WHT filings).
  • Validate intercompany invoicing, perform balance reconciliations, and prepare settlement proposals (netting, offsetting, cash settlement).
  • Monitor and manage BU cash flow, liquidity positions, and treasury activities, including forecasting and cash optimization.
  • Lead monthly closings, sub-group consolidations, and deliver performance analysis in management reports.
  • Support BU budget preparation and provide variance analysis.
  • Ensure compliance with statutory audit, corporate tax, GST, and withholding tax requirements; liaise with auditors and tax agents.
  • Collaborate with BU operations, HQ finance, and other group entities for smooth reporting processes.
  • Support ERP implementation, data migration, testing, and process improvements.
  • Enhance internal controls, documentation, and reporting workflows.

The Successful Applicant

  • Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline; CPA or CA designation is an advantage
  • 4-5 years of relevant accounting experience; Big 4 exposure is highly beneficial
  • Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting systems (e.g., Oracle)
  • Solid understanding of Singapore GST and corporate tax regulations
  • Experience in financial reporting, compliance, and month-end closing processes
  • Strong analytical skills with attention to detail and problem-solving mindset

What's on Offer

  • Be part of a fast-growing manufacturing company with its global HQ in Singapore
  • Opportunity to support expansion into Southeast Asia and new business ventures
  • Work closely with a strong and experienced leadership team
  • Take ownership of key financial functions, including treasury, cash flow, and sub-consolidation
  • Enjoy a dynamic environment with career growth and professional development opportunities

Contact
